Auto-translate on load
Mobile Layout (Force)

⚔ Realm Chronicle

A realm that remembers every hero, route, and battle

Welcome to the Realm

Choose a hero, enter a realm, and let the journey grow.

Start with a hero, pick how you want to enter the realm, then continue through exploration, combat, and map progress from a calmer shared hub.

Heroes Forge a hero with a signature skill and a history that stays with them.
Realms Keep generated realms, custom realms, and saved routes in one place.
Traversal Travel from area to area, trigger encounters, and continue where you left off.

🔐 Enter the Realm

Sign in with email, continue as a guest, or use an invite code to reopen the same profile from another device.

Use the same invite code to reopen the same profile from any device.
Need an account? Sign Up
Guest mode stays on this device. Invite mode keeps a protected shared identity. Full accounts keep ownership of your legends and vault.

⚔ Realm Chronicle

A world that remembers

Home

Welcome to the Realm

Use the hub to choose your next step: begin a new run, reopen a saved journey, or check the world map before heading back out.

🗺️ Step 1: Build a World

World Builder
Shape the realm before your legend enters it
Pick a realm archetype, set the world's identity, and bias the generator with biomes and threats. This feeds the topology, geography, and future map-authoring tools directly.
Topology First Geography Aware Override Ready
1. Realm Archetype
⚖️
Balanced Realm
Mixed routes, steady geography, and a versatile opening world
RoadsMixed Biomes
🔥
Inferno World
Harsh ridges, hazard routes, and scorched frontier pressure
HazardsVolcanic
💀
Cursed Lands
Fogged routes, corrupted terrain, and secret paths through ruin
SecretsCursed
🏛️
Ancient Ruins
Broken empires, lore-rich nodes, and archaeological routes
LoreRuins
🎲
Custom World
Define your own biome and threat bias for a generated realm
BuilderFlexible
2. World Identity
3. Saved Worlds

🗂️ Realm Archive

No realms recorded yet. Begin a journey and it will appear here.
4. Generation Outlook
Biome Bias
Threat Bias

Technical Mechanics

เมื่อพร้อมแล้ว กดปุ่มยืนยันเพื่อบันทึกตัวละครลงใน Legend Vault และแสดงใน Resume Adventure
